title: grants — scheduled tasks
description: Cron entries registered by `GrantServiceProvider::schedule()`. UTC throughout. `runOnOneServer` on every entry so multi-node worker pools do not duplicate work. `withoutOverlapping` where windows may exceed the interval.

entries.description: Hourly. Dispatches PurgeExpiredGrantsJob to sweep grants whose expires_at just crossed. Hourly cadence means a grant expires within 1 hour of its wall-clock cutoff — tight enough for time-boxed access, loose enough to keep the queue calm.
Daily 09:00 UTC. Dispatches NotifyGrantExpiringJob for grants expiring in the next 24 hours. 09:00 chosen to hit European working hours; expiring-tomorrow notifications land at start-of-day.
Daily 04:00 UTC. Hard-deletes revoked/expired grants past the P90D retention window (allow decision only — deny decisions retained indefinitely per compliance policy).

Weekly Monday 03:00 UTC — DRY RUN first. Emits metric + logs count of grants whose resource no longer exists but does not modify data. On-call reviews the output and triggers the non-dry version manually if the count looks reasonable.

Weekly Monday 05:00 UTC — real reconciliation. Runs after the dry-run so ops has two hours to disable this entry if the dry-run spotted anomalies. Auto-revokes orphaned grants with revoked_reason='orphaned_resource'.
Monthly 08:00 UTC on the 1st. Emits a report of feature-flag ages so long-lived flags don't linger past the 90-day GA retirement policy. Called by ops as part of monthly flag hygiene review.
